action_description.i_ching_divination: Perform a random I Ching hexagram reading using the three-coin method. Accepts an optional 'query' (string) for context.
action_description.bibliomantic_consultation: Perform a full bibliomantic consultation augmenting a user's question with I Ching wisdom. Requires 'query' (string).
action_description.get_hexagram_details: Look up detailed information about a specific hexagram by number. Requires 'hexagram_number' (integer, 1-64).
action_description.server_statistics: Return server status, capabilities, and system information. No parameters.
